assertions.assertion: The normal user-facing architecture confirmation workflow must not expose architecture_confirmation_state_checked as a manual user step.
assertions.proof: prepare-architecture-confirmation-page.ts runs the stale state check before rendering and records the internal step result in the prepare report.

assertions.assertion: Architecture confirmation JSON generation must be owned by requirements-contract-authoring, not a temporary one-off script or hand-written JSON.
assertions.proof: generate-architecture-confirmation-artifact.ts is skill-local, tested with fixture-driven inputs, and shares ArchitectureConfirmationHashRecipe canonicalization.

assertions.assertion: The implementation must not publish a root wrapper or hardcode REQ-CLOSED-LOOP-DESIGN, target paths, or impact scans into the producer or renderer.
assertions.proof: Acceptance tests invoke the skill-local scripts with temporary fixture source documents, target path files, consumer impact scans, governance impact scans, and trigger matrices.

assertions.assertion: Missing target paths, impact scans, trigger matrix, stale hash inputs, or recipe mismatch must block rendering instead of producing a fallback page.
assertions.proof: prepare-architecture-confirmation-page.test.ts covers missing required architecture inputs and expects a fail-closed result.
